prompt: Edit image 1, the Target receipt, by incorporating a key visual element from image 2. Modify the display of the total amount ($69.69) to be significantly larger, bolder, and centered, mimicking the prominent style of the "$28.00" display in image 2 to draw attention.
prompt_refined: Edit image 1, the Target receipt. Locate the total amount, '$69.69'. Reformat the display of this '$69.69' value to be significantly larger, bolder, and horizontally centered within the receipt's content area, replacing its current position. The visual style of this re-formatted '$69.69' should precisely emulate the prominent font size, weight, and overall presentation of the '$28.00' display in image 2, making the total stand out prominently.
objects: Itemized purchase list (BELKIN SCREE, EMUTEC CASE)
Large, bold, horizontally centered "$69.69" total amount
Original "TOTAL" label near payment details (should not be present)
Original "$69.69" value near payment details (should not be present)
